examples: Ischemia preadaptation can evidently reduce subcellular structure injury.
Results (1)Level of myocardium enzyme with ischemia reperfusion group is significantly different compared to ischemia preadaptation(P<0.01).
Method By using experimental rabbits IR (Ischemia Referpusion) and IP (Ischemia Preadaptation) model, we freely divide rabbits into 7 groups (8 rabbits every group).
